scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,yellow "npm run dev --workspace @llm-inspector/backend" "npm run dev --workspace @llm-inspector/frontend"
scripts.dev:open: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,yellow "npm run dev --workspace @llm-inspector/backend -- --open" "npm run dev --workspace @llm-inspector/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @llm-inspector/shared && npm run build --workspace @llm-inspector/backend && node scripts/patch-built-imports.mjs && npm run build --workspace @llm-inspector/frontend
